parameter_specs.name: rsi_buy_min
parameter_specs.description: Minimum RSI required to confirm a BUY

parameter_specs.name: rsi_overbought
parameter_specs.description: RSI level that triggers an exit

parameter_specs.name: oversold
parameter_specs.description: Buy when RSI is at or below this

parameter_specs.name: overbought
parameter_specs.description: Sell when RSI is at or above this
